# pps-kuaisearch environment manifest

Purpose: Batch 2b B5o KuaiSearch official ranking code.
Source requirements: `baselines/kuaisearch_official/requirements.txt`.

This file records the clean, reproducible dependency surface used for B5o
environment sanity. It is intentionally not a raw `pip freeze`, because the
working environment was cloned from an existing PyTorch environment and the raw
freeze included unrelated editable local packages and build paths.

Environment:

```bash
conda create -n pps-kuaisearch python=3.10 -y
conda activate pps-kuaisearch
pip install torch numpy transformers datasets accelerate peft sentence-transformers \
  faiss-cpu scikit-learn scipy pandas einops sentencepiece wandb pyyaml
```

Observed versions on 2026-07-09:

```text
python==3.10.20
torch==2.6.0+cu124
numpy==1.24.3
transformers==5.12.1
datasets==5.0.0
accelerate==1.14.0
peft==0.19.1
sentence-transformers==5.6.0
faiss-cpu==1.7.4
scikit-learn==1.7.2
scipy==1.13.1
pandas==2.0.3
einops==0.8.2
sentencepiece==0.2.1
wandb==0.28.0
pyyaml==6.0.2
```

Sanity command:

```bash
conda run -n pps-kuaisearch python baselines/kuaisearch_official/ranking/main.py --help
```
